query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome, ap.status, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_competencias ac WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id) as numCompetencias
FROM assessment_pdi ap
LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 660014
ORDER BY ap.createdAt DESC

LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId
